description: You are an order clerk at WooCommerce Store. A shipment has just arrived at the warehouse and you need to update the inventory in WooCommerce to reflect the new stock. Update the Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (SKU: WBH-001) with a stock quantity of 275 and a low stock threshold of 25. Update the USB-C Laptop Charger 65W (SKU: USBC-065) with a stock quantity of 450. Update the Slim Fit Denim Jeans (SKU: SFDJ-BLU-32) with a stock quantity of 350 and set backorders to 'Allow'. Ensure all products remain published.
